name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log). v3.0 added specode-distill; v3.1 closes AI-EDS P3-2; v3.2 lands FIX-1/2/3 consumer; v3.3.1 adds AI-EDS v0.9 痛点 #14 方案 D; v3.3.2 adds M8 cache vs marketplace drift hint. 3.4.0 lands v0.9 M1+M9 autonomous-mode defaults：resolve_root.py 新增 read-defaults / write-default / reset-default verbs + ~/.config/specode/defaults.json + 5 个 schema-validated keys（interactive / project_root_default / execution_mode_default / auto_distill / specs_root_default）+ 5 个 SPECODE_* env var override + SKILL.md 改约：每个 AskUserQuestion 调用前 read-defaults，interactive=false 时跳过用 default。Default schema interactive=true 保持向后兼容（零行为变化）。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ for FIX-2 / 0.4.4+ for FIX-3d/3e.
